shoot_guide.title: SHOOT GUIDE
shoot_guide.subtitle: BoomBoom Nasal Stick
shoot_guide.product_summary: BoomBoom Nasal Stick — 5 Heroes, 5 B-Roll Videos (3 VO + 2 No-Voice)
shoot_guide.tagline: 10 videos from one shoot — here's everything you need to capture

heroes.title: The Blind Unbox
notes: She ordered this off TikTok and has no idea what to expect. Unboxing energy.
Camera tight on her face for the first hit. Let the reaction breathe — don't rush to the next line.
Product label revealed AFTER the reaction, not before.
Film at kitchen counter or bathroom counter. Natural light.

lines.text: "You want to see something crazy."
[opens the package, pulls out the stick, looks at it skeptically]
"My friend sent me this little stick and told me to just breathe in. That's it. Just breathe."
[takes a hit — eyes go wide, grabs the counter, steps back]
"Oh my God. OH. That is… it's like someone opened every window in my head at the same time."
[reads the label]
"It's just essential oils? Menthol and eucalyptus? This little thing? I need to order more of these right now."
"I'm linking it. Go."

heroes.title: The Can't Sleep Congestion
notes: She looks like she hasn't slept. Real tired, congested energy — not performed.
Film in bedroom or on the couch. Tissue box nearby. She's been dealing with this.
Urgency is the driver — she's been suffering and this is the thing that finally worked.
The relief moment on camera needs to land. Give it space.

lines.text: "Stop mouth breathing through the night. It's wrecking your sleep."
"I was doing it for four days straight. Could not sleep. My throat was destroyed every morning."
"Then I remembered I had this little stick someone told me about on TikTok."
[grabs BoomBoom from nightstand, takes a hit]
"Oh my God. I can breathe. Like RIGHT NOW. That was instant. It's menthol and eucalyptus."
"I just ordered a bunch more. I'm not doing that again. Link's right here — seriously."

heroes.title: The Before and After
notes: This is a transformation video. The before and after IS the content.
Start stuffed up — mouth breathing, puffy, tired. Don't fake it. If she's not congested, film this one when she actually is.
One continuous shot for the transformation. No cuts between before and after.
Film at bathroom mirror or kitchen counter. Close on face.

lines.text: "Do you see this? Now watch what happens."
[visibly congested — breathing through mouth, puffy]
[picks up BoomBoom, takes a slow hit through each nostril]
[holds for a beat — then exhales long and slow through nose, eyes close, shoulders drop]
"That's it. That's the difference. Before and after. One breath."
"It's an essential oil stick. Menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint. They've sold like ten million of these. It was on Shark Tank."
"I'll link it."

heroes.title: The Tired Mom Reset
notes: She's exhausted. Real mom energy — not cute exhaustion, actual tiredness.
Film on the couch or in the kitchen. She's been going all day.
Product is her reset — she reaches for it like it's routine.
Keep the tone light and relatable. This is a hack she's sharing, not a sales pitch.

lines.text: "I used to literally dread waking up congested every morning."
[exhausted face, slumped on couch or leaning on counter]
"Like I would wake up and already know the whole day was gonna be a fog."
[reaches for BoomBoom, takes a hit, visible relief — eyes widen, deep breath]
"It's this little nasal stick with essential oils. You just breathe in and it's like someone turned the lights on in your brain."
"Better than coffee. I keep it in my pocket all day. I'm linking it."

heroes.title: The TikTok Made Me Buy It
notes: Skeptic energy at the start — she saw it everywhere, was doubtful, finally ordered it.
Film at kitchen counter or living room. Product still in shipping packaging if possible.
The payoff is that she becomes a believer. Her reaction validates everyone else's hype.
End with genuine 'OK TikTok was right' energy.

lines.text: "People don't realize what this little stick actually does to your sinuses."
"Ten million sold. It was on Shark Tank. And I was like OK fine, I'll try it."
[takes a hit]
"Oh. Oh no."
"OK yeah. I get it. That is… wow. It's like AC for your nose."
"I already ordered three more. I hate when TikTok is right. Link's right here."

broll.description: Opening the shipping package at kitchen table. First look at the product. Unboxing energy — film this FIRST before anything else.
Outer packaging close-up while still sealed. Brand name visible. Clean counter background.
Product tube close-up on kitchen counter. Brand name and cap visible. Clean background.
Back of packaging or label — ingredients visible (menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint).
Size comparison — stick next to lipstick, pen, or keys on counter to show how small it is.
Stick on nightstand next to phone/alarm clock. Morning light through window.
Before face: mouth breathing on couch, looking congested and tired. Tissue box nearby. (Film before using the product.)
Uncapping the stick. Slow, satisfying cap removal. Close on her hands.
Rolling the stick between fingers. Texture and portability close-up.
Stick held up to nose, side angle. Deep inhale. Close on face — capture the exact moment.
The shock face — eyes wide, jaw drops after first hit. Close on face at counter.
The relief exhale — long slow breath out through nose, shoulders drop. Bathroom mirror or kitchen.
After face: same spot as B7 on couch, deep nasal breath with eyes closed, visible relief. (The 'after' to B7's 'before'.)
Dropping the stick into her purse or bag by the front door. Quick, casual.
Pulling it from her pocket or from the counter — like she always has it within reach.

voiceovers.script: Do you see how stuffed up I am right now? Watch what one breath does. I found this little essential oil stick on TikTok. You just breathe in and everything opens. Like before and after are two different people. Menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint. They've sold over ten million of these. It was on Shark Tank. I keep one on my nightstand now. Link's right here.

Stop trying to sleep through congestion. It's not going away on its own. I went four days like that. Mouth breathing all night. Wrecked every morning. Then I found this little nasal stick on TikTok called BoomBoom. One breath and everything just opened up. Instant. Menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint. I ordered a bunch because I'm not doing that again. Link below.

I used to literally dread three PM every single day. That's when the fog hits and you can barely keep your eyes open. Then someone told me about this little nasal stick. You breathe in and it's like someone turned the lights back on. Menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint. Costs like five dollars and lasts a month. I keep it in my pocket all day now. Better than coffee. I'll link it.

remixes.title: B-Roll 1 — The Congestion Emergency
broll_assembly: B7 — Before face: mouth breathing on couch, looking congested and tired (the FEAR — this is what congestion does)
B15 — Reaching for BoomBoom from counter (the SOLUTION — within arm's reach)
B8 — Uncapping the stick (transition — relief incoming)
B10 — Deep inhale through nose (the turning point)
B12 — Relief exhale at bathroom mirror (URGENCY resolved — she can breathe)
B4 — Ingredients label close-up (credibility: menthol, eucalyptus, peppermint)

remixes.title: B-Roll 2 — The Unboxing Shock
remixes.info_line: BOOMBOOM • NO VOICEOVER — music + text only • Music: Trending sound (surprise/reaction energy — editor's choice)
broll_assembly: B1 — Opening the shipping package at kitchen table (SETUP — what did she order?)
B3 — First look at the product close-up (CURIOSITY — what is this little thing?)
B9 — Examining it, rolling between fingers (BUILDING tension)
B8 — Uncapping skeptically (she's not sure about this)
B10 — First inhale — close on face (the MOMENT)
B11 — SHOCK face — eyes wide, jaw drops (the PAYOFF)
B4 — Flips to read ingredients — just essential oils?
onscreen_text_script: [0:00-0:02] ordered this off TikTok 📦 no idea what to expect | OST1
[0:04-0:06] it says just breathe in?? | ORIGINAL
[0:14-0:17] BoomBoom nasal stick. 10M sold. link ⬇️ | OST9

remixes.title: B-Roll 3 — Stuffed to Clear in 10 Seconds
broll_assembly: B7 — BEFORE: congested on couch, mouth breathing, puffy, miserable (the PROBLEM — make it obvious)
B3 — Product on counter next to her (the SOLUTION is right there)
B8 — Uncapping the stick (TRANSITION begins)
B10 — Deep inhale through each nostril — hold the shot (DURING — transformation happening)
B13 — AFTER: same couch, deep nasal breath with eyes closed (TRANSFORMATION complete)
B11 — Eyes open — clear, awake, different energy
B4 — Ingredients label (what made it happen)
onscreen_text_script: [0:04-0:07] watch what happens in 10 seconds 👀 | OST4

remixes.title: B-Roll 4 — The Tired Mom Hack
broll_assembly: B7 — Exhausted on couch, barely awake (the PROBLEM — tired mom energy)
B15 — Reaching for the stick from counter (she knows where it is — it's routine)
B8 — Uncapping (SOLUTION revealed)
B10 — Deep inhale from stick (applying the SOLUTION)
B12 — Relief exhale — eyes brighter, energy shifts (PROBLEM solved)
B5 — Size comparison next to her coffee mug (this little thing > coffee)
B3 — Brand close-up
onscreen_text_script: [0:00-0:03] TIRED MOM. can barely function. 😩 | OST6
[0:10-0:13] one breath = lights back on 💡 | OST4

remixes.title: B-Roll 5 — The Morning Ritual
remixes.info_line: BOOMBOOM • NO VOICEOVER — music + text only • Music: Trending sound (calm morning aesthetic — editor's choice)
broll_assembly: B6 — Stick on nightstand, morning light through window (the LIFESTYLE — aspirational setting)
B15 — Hand reaching for it first thing (ROUTINE — before coffee, before phone)
B8 — Slow uncapping (RITUAL — satisfying, intentional)
B10 — Deep morning inhale, eyes closed (the MOMENT — calm, not rushed)
B12 — Relief exhale — still in bed or just sitting up (ASPIRATION — easy morning)
B9 — Rolling stick between fingers, content (she's awake now)
B3 — Product close-up in morning light on nightstand
